tableComment: dwm-优惠券域-明细表-增量表
businessSummary: 优惠券与津贴业务明细表，覆盖发放、领取、退回、使用及优惠金额等信息，可按券或活动相关属性分析。
reviewNote: 由表 DDL 与 Topic Builder 领域启发式语义层生成，待业务复核后可继续微调
manualNotes: 优惠券/津贴明细表，承载优惠券发放、领取、退回、优惠金额与津贴金额

semanticColumns.evidence: schema comment=券编号; samples=[coupon_id_001, coupon_id_002, coupon_id_003, coupon_id_004, coupon_id_005, coupon_id_006, coupon_id_007, coupon_id_008]

schema comment=用户id; samples=[user_dwm_coupon_detail_di_001, user_dwm_coupon_detail_di_002, user_dwm_coupon_detail_di_003, user_dwm_coupon_detail_di_004, user_dwm_coupon_detail_di_005, user_dwm_coupon_detail_di_006, user_dwm_coupon_detail_di_007, user_dwm_coupon_detail_di_008]

schema comment=状态name; samples=[coupon_send_status_name_1, coupon_send_status_name_2, coupon_send_status_name_3, coupon_send_status_name_4, coupon_send_status_name_5, coupon_send_status_name_6, coupon_send_status_name_7, coupon_send_status_name_8]

schema comment=优惠券活动结束时间

metrics.description: 优惠券金额投入，按优惠券明细表 coupon_amt 聚合；可用于回答券金额投入、优惠券投入、优惠投入等问题
按券编号去重统计优惠券发放量
metrics.evidence: 由 Topic Builder 基于字段组合自动生成

metrics.formula: SUM(CASE WHEN is_receive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
metrics.description: 按是否抢到优惠券统计领取量
metrics.evidence: 由 Topic Builder 基于字段组合自动生成

metrics.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN coupon_refund_id <> '' THEN coupon_refund_id END)
metrics.description: 按优惠券退回编号统计退回量
metrics.evidence: 由 Topic Builder 基于字段组合自动生成

terms.description: 优惠券、津贴、补贴活动相关明细与金额
terms.evidence: 由表名/字段语义自动沉淀

knowledgeRules.title: 时间范围过滤
knowledgeRules.content: 涉及最近N天、昨天、上个月等时间表达时，必须优先使用 `pt` 做业务日期过滤。
knowledgeRules.evidence: Topic Builder 从时间字段识别

knowledgeRules.title: 商家范围过滤
knowledgeRules.content: 回答单个商家问题时，必须用 `seller_id` 过滤当前商家，避免查到全站数据。
knowledgeRules.evidence: Topic Builder 从 merchant_id/seller_id 字段识别

knowledgeRules.title: 明细查询优先使用明细表
knowledgeRules.content: 用户问“明细、哪几单、列表、记录”时，应使用该明细表返回真实单据，不要用 ads 指标表兜底伪装明细。

knowledgeRules.title: 优惠券与优惠订单区分
knowledgeRules.content: dwm_coupon_detail_di 是券/津贴明细表，可回答优惠券发放、领取、退回和优惠金额；用户问“优惠订单量/优惠订单数”时，应优先使用经营画像中的优惠订单指标，不要用券数量替代订单量。
knowledgeRules.evidence: 优惠券表与经营画像指标边界

knowledgeRules.title: 优惠券领取与退回口径
knowledgeRules.content: 优惠券领取看 `is_receive = 1`；优惠券退回看 `coupon_refund_id` 或 `refund_time`；津贴金额字段 `allowance_amt` 为字符串时需 CAST 后聚合。
